title: BossDB: A cloud-native approach for petascale neuroscience discovery
abstract: BossDB is a scalable cloud-native data ecosystem for storing, accessing, and processing multidimensional volumetric neuroscience datasets. Focused on FAIR principles, it utilizes cloud-based infrastructure to facilitate petascale EM and XRM data access and analysis.
notes: Already in existing 102. Core infrastructure for many connectomics datasets.
